hooks.command: PROJ="C:/Users/hp/OneDrive/Desktop/client-websites/Pressure Washing website demo (professional)"; INPUT=$(cat); FILEPATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); BASENAME=$(basename "${FILEPATH:-site}" 2>/dev/null); cd "$PROJ" && git add . && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "Update ${BASENAME}" && git push origin main) 2>&1 || true
